title: Echoes of Silence
description: A large-scale oil painting exploring the tension between presence and absence, using muted tones and vast negative space to evoke a meditative stillness.
descriptionZh: 一幅大型油画，探讨存在与缺席之间的张力，运用柔和色调与大量留白营造冥想般的静谧。

title: Fractured Landscape II
description: Continuing the exploration of fragmented terrains, this work combines traditional ink wash with acrylic layering to create a sense of geological time.
descriptionZh: 延续对破碎地形的探索，将传统水墨与丙烯层叠结合，营造地质时间感。

title: Weightless Form
description: A mirror-polished stainless steel sculpture that reflects and distorts its surroundings, questioning the boundary between object and environment.
descriptionZh: 镜面抛光不锈钢雕塑，反射并扭曲周围环境，质疑物体与环境的边界。

title: Infinite Recursion
description: An immersive installation using infinitely reflecting mirrors and programmed LED light sequences to create a sense of boundless digital space.
descriptionZh: 沉浸式装置，利用无限反射镜与编程LED光序列创造无边数字空间感。

title: Digital Erosion
description: A generative video work that simulates the erosion of digital images over time, creating abstract landscapes from decompressed data artifacts.
descriptionZh: 生成式影像作品，模拟数字图像随时间侵蚀，从解压数据伪影中创造抽象风景。

title: Topology of Memory
description: A bronze sculpture mapping the artist's childhood neighborhood as a three-dimensional topographic form, preserving spatial memory in metal.
descriptionZh: 铜雕，将艺术家童年街区映射为三维地形，在金属中保存空间记忆。

title: Threshold
medium: Oil and gold leaf on linen
description: Gold leaf fragments interrupt the painted surface, creating luminous thresholds between the figurative and the abstract.
descriptionZh: 金箔碎片打断画面，在具象与抽象之间创造发光的边界。

title: Resonant Field
description: A 12-channel sound installation composing field recordings from industrial sites into a meditative spatial experience.
descriptionZh: 12声道声音装置，将工业场地田野录音编织为冥想式空间体验。

title: Data Paintings
description: Algorithmic paintings generated from real-time climate data, translating temperature and wind patterns into compositional structures.
descriptionZh: 由实时气候数据生成的算法绘画，将温度与风场模式转化为构图结构。

title: Untitled (Void)
description: A monumental charcoal drawing that uses dense mark-making to create a void-like center, pulling the viewer into depth.
descriptionZh: 大型炭笔画，以密集笔触营造虚空般的中心，将观者吸入深度之中。

title: Floating Architecture
description: Translucent resin panels suspended by steel wire create an architectural form that appears to float, illuminated from within by soft LEDs.
descriptionZh: 钢丝悬挂的半透明树脂面板构成似乎漂浮的建筑形态，内部LED散发柔光。

title: Parallel Digest
description: An interactive web-based installation where visitors' browsing data is transformed in real-time into evolving visual compositions.
descriptionZh: 交互式网络装置，访客浏览数据实时转化为不断演化的视觉构成。
